From bug 264389 comment 4:

>   …
>   # sysrc kld_list+=nvidia-drm
>   # service kld restart

Each of the two ports will benefit from a package message. 

In the meantime, <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Graphics#NVIDIA> includes relevant hints.

Thanks
